name: Mystery Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, process the cream cheese, 1 egg, 1/3 cup sugar, and 1 teaspoon vanilla until fluffy.
2. Spread the mixture evenly in the bottom of the unbaked pie shell.
3. Sprinkle the pecans over the cheese mixture.
4. Beat the 3 eggs with an electric mixer until foamy; do not overmix.
5. Add the corn syrup, 1/4 cup sugar, 1 teaspoon vanilla, and salt to the eggs. Mix well.
6. Pour the filling over the pecans.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 40 minutes.
8. Serve warm or cold.
